consistency_issues: SKILL.md merge loop only considers stampede/* branches, excludes havoc-swarm/*
Task branch placeholder casing varies but both represent same pattern

findings.merge_handling: Merger reads branch from result JSON - no prefix filtering, any branch in results is merged
findings.cleanup_handling: NO explicit cleanup for havoc-swarm branches - teardown kills processes but leaves branches intact

agent_branch_logic.stampede-agent: stampede/{task_id} via git checkout -b with fallback

key_git_commands: git checkout main || git checkout master (cleanup)

findings.teardown_behavior: Kills PIDs, removes PID files, kills tmux - does NOT delete branches
recommendations: Docs claim teardown cleans branches but it doesn't - fix docs or implementation
Add explicit branch cleanup command documentation
Consider optional branch deletion in teardown

key_findings: Two distinct branch prefixes: stampede/ (workers/merger) and havoc-swarm/ (commanders)
All agents enforce NEVER commit to main rule
Merger discovers branches from result JSON files, not by prefix filtering
Branch cleanup is manual - teardown only cleans processes, not git branches
SKILL.md merge loop may miss havoc-swarm/* branches (only lists stampede/*)
issues_identified: Documentation claims teardown cleans branches but it doesn't
Potential merge gap: havoc-swarm/* branches excluded from SKILL.md merge loop
No explicit documentation for manual branch cleanup commands
synthesis.notes: Worker wkr-031-003 failed due to rate limiting, but stampede prefix handling was covered by other workers' overlapping investigations
